title: campanula lanceolata var. major
intro: Campanula lanceolata var. major, also known as the tall bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula lanceolata var. major include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and ointments to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
